scripts.build: npm run check:intents && npm run check:metadata && npm run check:architecture && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build:webpack && npm run check:bundles
scripts.profile:bundles: CLEARSIG_BUNDLE_PROFILE=1 npm run build:webpack && node scripts/profile-sdk-bundles.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run check:intents && npm run check:metadata && npm run check:architecture && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.test:send-matrix: vitest run src/features/send/domain/batch.test.ts src/features/send/domain/bitcoin.test.ts src/features/send/domain/solanaSend.test.ts src/features/send/infrastructure/sendVerificationMatrix.test.ts src/features/send/infrastructure/solanaProposalStatus.test.ts src/features/send/routes/sendModuleBoundaries.test.ts src/lib/chain/__tests__/btc.test.ts src/lib/chain/__tests__/btcIntentReadiness.test.ts src/lib/chain/__tests__/eth.test.ts src/lib/chain/__tests__/send-support.test.ts src/lib/chain/__tests__/solanaTokens.test.ts src/lib/chain/__tests__/stablecoins.test.ts src/lib/chain/__tests__/zcash.test.ts src/lib/clearsign/__tests__/remoteSendRoutes.test.ts src/lib/clearsign/__tests__/typedProposalSigningContract.test.ts src/lib/policies/__tests__/enforce.test.ts src/lib/policies/__tests__/sendCoverage.test.ts
